title: Elbaf’s Wounds Reopen
description: On pages 9–11, this part follows Usopp, Unknown person #7, King Harald, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Loki as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: When Elbaf finally joins the world government...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I plan to relinquish the throne.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A younger, more virtuous ruler than I should take over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That is a matter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...For Mu to Decide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is there someone on the empty throne?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Come.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Mu has been watching thee, Harald.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: JWAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This power!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's Surging Within Me!! It's Chilling!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...this is the power of "immortality."

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: He is now beyond any wild monster...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It still sends shivers down the spine...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has been forged into a mighty weapon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Consider myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: An immortal Knight sworn to Mu.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: IMMORTAL??? I can't believe it...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Carve an abyss Pentagon in Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That will mark the bond between us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Thy Dearest wish shall finally be granted...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huzzah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...as soon as this last mission is completed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Thank you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elbaf will be recognized as a member nation of the world government.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: King Harald!!

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
